title: Llama7B composed datapath score32/w16 exact-div frontier
hypothesis: If the widened score32/v8/w16 composed datapath remains physically feasible, it should replace the invalidated s8/w8 reciprocal-LUT mixed-int8 energy row as the quality-backed precision candidate for the next Llama7B frontier ranking.

direct_comparison.primary_question: After measuring the score32/v8/w16 composed wrapper, what latency/area/precision point does it imply when substituted into the Llama7B dual-stream schedule?
include: consume measured score32/w16 exact-div composed datapath metrics
substitute the measured wrapper into the existing Llama7B sub-tile schedule
record feasibility, adjusted latency, required area, and precision profile
exclude: full end-to-end energy reranking until this feasibility record exists

required_evaluations.objective: Substitute the measured score32/v8/w16 exact-div composed dual-stream attention wrapper into the Llama7B schedule and record the quality-backed frontier cost direction.

expected_result.reason: This is the first Llama7B schedule substitution using measured PPA for the quality-recovered score32/v8/w16 path.

remaining_abstractions: This substitutes measured local datapath PPA into an existing analytic schedule; HBM/SRAM/NoC service models remain unchanged.
The measured softmax structure is exact-divider based and not a full floating exp datapath.
